negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_049
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of an open red toolbox drawer, filled with an assortment of tools, including screwdrivers with red handles and yellow accents, wrenches, and other hand tools. The drawer is part of a larger red toolbox with multiple compartments, some of which are labeled with white tags indicating their contents. A robotic arm, equipped with a black claw-like mechanism, enters the frame from above and begins to interact with the tools inside the drawer. The robotic arm grasps one of the screwdrivers, lifting it up and moving it out of the drawer; the camera follows the motion smoothly, capturing the tool's movement against the backdrop of the toolbox. The video ends with both the robot arm and the tool out of the frame.
